Unsafe ⚠️

On this page

Basic guide about privacy and staying safe online ​

How to Activate Windows/Office? 🪟

Click here for activation

Which is the best Browser for privacy? 🌐

Tor > Mullvad > LibreWolf > Brave > Firefox

But again with greater security comes greater inconveniences, its always smart to keep at least two browsers balancing security and convenience.

I recommend Brave as primary browser and Firefox with recommended extensions for normie users.

Avoid browsers like Opera, not recommended even for normal usage, very bad privacy policies, besides predatory loan apps

Which is the best Antivirus? 🛡️

None.

You don't need any antivirus, the built-in windows defender should suffice. Make sure you don't download stupid crap from internet, staying vigilant is very important.

However if you still feel like you want an antivirus, malwarebytes is the one I can vouch for

I dont need Edge browser, should I uninstall it?

Yes! There's no point of keeping it, if you dont ever plan to use it.

Click here to uninstall edge

Make sure you set some other browser as default before deleting this.

How can I make my download faster

Some websites impose file transfer limits for a single thread, thereby restricting download speeds. Download managers overcome this limitation by leveraging multiple threads for downloading, resulting in faster download speeds.

Using a download manager can speed up your download
